title: Assistant Store Manager - Crossword Bookstores - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Crossword Bookstores - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Crossword Bookstores in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Crossword Bookstores:
Crossword Bookstores is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Crossword Bookstores!
